message:
refactor(net): update TcpSocket tests for SO_REUSEADDR/REUSEPORT support and clarify happy_eyeballs

TcpSocket tests (src/net/tcp/socket.rs):
- Update test_listen_reuseaddr_unsupported → test_listen_with_reuseaddr:
  now expects listen() to succeed with SO_REUSEADDR set (matching the
  recent fix in cda864be that added support)
- Update test_listen_reuseport_unsupported → test_listen_with_reuseport:
  same pattern for SO_REUSEPORT on unix
- Tests verify the returned listener has a valid bound port

Happy eyeballs (src/net/happy_eyeballs.rs):
- Add clarifying comments for Pin::new polling, element shift after
  remove, and RFC 8305 Section 5.4 (immediate next attempt on failure)
- Replace std::mem::drop with drop() for clarity

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
